narrative:
Eden Fall Township (precinct in Licking County) has 1,431 registered voters, with 50.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 28.9 percentage points.
